title: Glud pack REBORN
description: Classic gludpack pvp from 1.12.2 is now here!
body:
### GLUD PACK REBORN
add :

- diamond tools
- diamond armor
- diamond block and ore

- short netherite sword  
- short diamond sword

- ender crystal
- obsidian, enderchest and bedrock
- items like golden apple, totem and ender pearl, etc...

- custom gui features
![tp example](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/763609b46019c96f9e313dcf99f4456adadea21b.png)
